videos.headline: UVA strikes first with TD
videos.description: Chandler Morris hits Sage Ennis for a 6-yard Virginia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA strikes first with TD) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: UVA gets a red-zone pick with a must-see play
videos.description: Ja'son Prevard tips a pass to himself for an interception to give Virginia possession.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA gets a red-zone pick with a must-see play) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chandler Morris keeps it for a UVA TD
videos.description: Chandler Morris scrambles 11 yards into the end zone for a Virginia score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chandler Morris keeps it for a UVA TD) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU gets on the board
videos.description: Gavin Sawchuk rushes in on a 2-yard touchdown for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU gets on the board) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Edwin Joseph picks off a pass for Florida State
videos.description: Edwin Joseph intercepts a pass from Chandler Morris for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Edwin Joseph picks off a pass for Florida State) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU evens game with Randy Pittman Jr.'s TD
videos.description: Randy Pittman Jr. enters the end zone on a 2-yard score for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU evens game with Randy Pittman Jr.'s TD) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU gets a boost with another INT
videos.description: Elijah Herring makes a heads-up interception for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU gets a boost with another INT) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State scores its third consecutive TD for lead
videos.description: Thomas Castellanos helps Florida State go ahead with a 4-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State scores its third consecutive TD for lead) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: J'Mari Taylor somehow emerges from pile to score a Virginia TD
videos.description: J'Mari Taylor ties the score on a 26-yard touchdown run for Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (J'Mari Taylor somehow emerges from pile to score a Virginia TD) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: UVA regains the lead on Morris' second rushing TD
videos.description: Chandler Morris scores his second rushing touchdown to put Virginia on top.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UVA regains the lead on Morris' second rushing TD) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State uses jump pass to go level with Virginia
videos.description: Randy Pittman Jr. makes a 4-yard leaping touchdown throw to Duce Robinson for the Florida State score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State uses jump pass to go level with Virginia) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chandler Morris floats TD for a Virginia lead
videos.description: Chandler Morris finds Xavier Brown for a 15-yard Virginia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chandler Morris floats TD for a Virginia lead) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State scores ridiculous TD on fourth down to tie the score
videos.description: Randy Pittman Jr. makes a terrific catch in the end zone with 36 seconds left to bring Florida State back even.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State scores ridiculous TD on fourth down to tie the score) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State forces OT with an interception
videos.description: Ja'Bril Rawls picks off Chandler Morris to send the game to overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'Bril Rawls had an interception vs. Virginia) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'Son Prevard had an interception vs. Florida State
videos.description: Ja'Son Prevard had an interception vs. Florida State

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'Son Prevard had an interception vs. Florida State) 2025/09/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chandler Morris puts UVA on top in double OT
videos.description: Chandler Morris gets in the end zone for his third rushing score for Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Chandler Morris puts UVA on top in double OT) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Fans rush the field after UVA upsets No. 8 FSU
videos.description: Florida State is unable to convert on fourth down in double overtime against Virginia, and fans storm the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Fans rush the field after UVA upsets No. 8 FSU) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU's Duce Robinson's TD overturned on bobbles
videos.description: Florida State's Duce Robinson bobbles the pass and catches it, but cannot control the ball before he steps out of the back of the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU's Duce Robinson's TD overturned on bobbles) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.description: Jake Weinberg kicks -yard field goal
